meta.title: Flexen — AI Coach for Fitness, Nutrition & Wellbeing
meta.description: Flexen uses AI for personalized meal plans, workout tracking and automatic calorie counting. For iOS & Android. Start free today.

hero.headline: Your AI coach for fitness, nutrition & wellbeing
hero.subline: Snap a photo of your meal, let Julio build your workout plan, and sleep better — all in one app. No more manual tracking.
hero.microcopy: No credit card required · Cancel anytime

morning.title: Good morning. Your sleep score is ready.
morning.description: Flexen analyzes your sleep automatically via Health Connect. No wearable needed. See how rested you are instantly — and what you can improve today.

breakfast.title: Snap a photo. Know your calories.
breakfast.description: Tired of weighing every single ingredient? Take a photo of your breakfast. Flexen's AI identifies food in under 2 seconds and logs calories and macros automatically.

training.title: Your plan. Your pace. Your coach.
training.description: Tell Julio what you want to train. He builds your plan — with timers, sets and rest periods. Personalized to your level, your goals and your equipment.

evening.title: Say it out loud. Julio listens.
evening.description: Long day? Capture your thoughts with voice input. Flexen converts your voice to text — your journal, without typing a single word.

night.title: Sleep well. Flexen's got you.
night.description: Sleep tracking starts automatically. Tomorrow morning you'll know how deep you slept. Good night.

features.sectionTitle: Everything you need. Nothing you don't.
features.sectionSubtitle: Nutrition, training, sleep, mental health — one app instead of five.

julio.title: Julio — Your personal AI coach
julio.description: Julio isn't a chatbot. He knows your data, your goals, your routine. Ask him what to eat, get a custom workout plan, or get tips for better sleep. In real time.

foodAI.title: Snap a photo instead of typing
foodAI.description: Pull out your phone, take a photo, done. Flexen's AI recognizes your food and calculates calories and macros automatically. Plus: barcode scanner for packaged foods.

training.title: Workout plans that adapt
training.description: No generic cookie-cutter plan. Julio creates workouts based on your progress, equipment and available time. With built-in timer and exercise guides.

sleep.title: Understand your sleep. Improve your sleep.
sleep.description: Automatic sleep tracking via Health Connect. See your sleep phases, spot patterns, and finally understand why you wake up tired.

journal.title: Your mind needs training too
journal.description: Journal with voice input, mood tracking and daily writing prompts. Because fitness doesn't just happen at the gym.

testimonials.name: Sarah M.
testimonials.text: I don't have time to log every single calorie. With Flexen I just take a photo and I'm done. Saves me at least 15 minutes every day.

testimonials.name: Marco T.
testimonials.text: Julio built me a better training plan than my gym buddy who's been lifting for 5 years. And the plan adjusts every week.

testimonials.name: Lisa K.
testimonials.text: Finally an app that's not just about the gym. The journal and sleep tracking helped me improve my entire routine.

pricing.sectionSubtitle: Start free. Upgrade when you're ready.

free.name: Free
free.subtitle: To get started
features: 3 AI queries per day with Julio

items.question: Is Flexen really free?
items.answer: Yes. The basic version is free forever — no trial period, no catch. Premium unlocks advanced AI features and unlimited usage.

items.question: How accurate is the AI food recognition?
items.answer: Flexen's AI recognizes over 10,000 foods with approximately 90% accuracy. You can always correct results, and the AI learns from your corrections.

items.question: Who is Julio?
items.answer: Julio is Flexen's AI coach. He's not a simple chatbot — he has access to all your data and can take action: create workout plans, give nutrition advice, and answer your questions.

items.question: Do I need a wearable for sleep tracking?
items.answer: No. Flexen uses Health Connect on Android and HealthKit on iOS. If you have a wearable, data syncs automatically. Without one, you can track sleep manually.

items.question: Does Flexen work on iOS and Android?
items.answer: Yes, Flexen is available on both platforms. Download the app from the App Store or Google Play Store.

items.question: Can I cancel Premium anytime?
items.answer: Absolutely. Cancel anytime — directly in the app or through your app store. No hidden fees, no tricks.

items.question: Is my data sold to third parties?
items.answer: Never. Your health data belongs to you. We don't sell user data and never will. Learn more in our privacy policy.

items.question: What makes Flexen different from MyFitnessPal or Noom?
items.answer: Flexen is the only app that combines an AI coach, photo food recognition, workout planning, sleep tracking and journaling in one app. Others do one thing — Flexen does it all.

items.question: Are there family or group features?
items.answer: We currently offer friend codes and nudges to motivate your friends. Family plans are on our roadmap.

items.question: What languages is Flexen available in?
items.answer: Flexen is currently available in German and English. More languages are coming.

finalCta.headline: Ready for your first day?
finalCta.subline: Start free. No subscription required. Julio's waiting.
